settings.enabledHint: Toggle all Netrunning Architect features on or off.
settings.autoInterfaceChecksHint: Automatically prompt Interface rolls when moving between floors.
settings.fogOfWarHint: Hide unexplored floors in the tracker view.
settings.showFloorDVsToPlayersHint: Display floor Difficulty Values to players before they explore.
settings.autoTriggerIceHint: Automatically trigger Black ICE encounters when entering a floor with ICE.
settings.netCombatAutoRollHint: Automatically roll initiative for Black ICE in NET combat.
settings.defaultDifficultyHint: Default difficulty for random architecture generation.
settings.animationSpeedHint: Speed of floor reveal and movement animations (100-1000ms).
settings.compactModeHint: Use a more compact floor display layout.
settings.tilePathHint: Directory containing floor tile images. Default uses the CPR system tiles.
settings.tileExtensionHint: File extension for tile images (webp for static, webm for animated).
settings.tileGridSizeHint: Pixel size of each grid unit for tile placement. Default: 110.
settings.tileOrientationHint: Layout direction: Left to Right or Top to Bottom.

tiles.clickToPlace: Click on the canvas to place the architecture (top-left corner). Press ESC to cancel.
tiles.confirmClear: Remove all placed tiles for this architecture from the scene?
tiles.mazeModeHint: Randomly shift some floors sideways to create a maze-like layout.

builder.title: NET Architecture Builder
builder.dropZoneHint: Drop Black ICE or programs here
builder.confirmClear: Clear all floors from this architecture? This cannot be undone.
builder.generateFloorCount: Number of floors will be determined by 3d6.
builder.generateReplace: This will replace all existing floors. Continue?

tracker.title: Netrunner Tracker
tracker.selectArchitecture: Choose an architecture to jack into:
tracker.confirmJackOut: Jack out of the NET Architecture? Any active combat will end.
tracker.noArchitectures: No NET Architecture items found in this world.
tracker.atLobby: You are at the lobby. Cannot move higher.
tracker.atBottom: You have reached the deepest floor.
tracker.jackedOut: has jacked out of the NET.

combat.title: NET Combat
combat.confirmEndCombat: End NET combat on this floor?

netActions.scannerDesc: Reveal the contents of a floor within range without entering it.
netActions.backdoorDesc: Bypass a Password on the current floor.
netActions.controlDesc: Take control of a Control Node.
netActions.eyedeeDesc: Identify a program, ICE, or file.
netActions.pathfinderDesc: Reduce the DV of moving to the next floor.
netActions.slideDesc: Quickly move away from ICE without triggering an attack.
netActions.virusDesc: Reduce the REZ of a program or ICE.
netActions.zapDesc: Attack a target with your Interface ability.
